extension.description: Setup kit for a configured family Kodi environment. Contains no credentials.
extension.news:
v0.9.9 - Show separate DutchTech and English AF3 Widget Importer quick presets
v0.9.8 - Require KodiSkin Widget Importer 0.1.17 with DutchTech and English AF3 widget presets
v0.9.7 - Fix confirmation dialogs so warning text is readable in Kodi skins
v0.9.6 - Add Utilities menu with cache cleanup, status, debug export, skin reload, and restart actions
v0.9.5 - Add fullscreen video Back button stop keymap
v0.9.4 - Update the bundled AF3 widget preset from the active MacBook skin
v0.9.3 - Add KodiSkin Widget Importer launcher
v0.9.2 - Move GUI and skin settings tools into submenus
v0.9.1 - Add rename and delete tools for settings presets
v0.9.0 - Add named GUI and skin settings presets - Add save-current-profile preset tools
v0.8.0 - Add skin settings backup and restore tools
v0.7.0 - Add GUI settings backup and restore tools
v0.6.2 - Rename add-on to Kodi Setup Kit
v0.6.1 - Fix the English language placeholder so Kodi's PO parser accepts the add-on cleanly.
v0.6.0 - Add Kodi keymaps installer - Require Fen Light quick rescrape helper for keymap actions - Bundle current Fen Light quick rescrape keymaps
v0.5.0 - Add Kodi network advanced settings installer
v0.4.4 - Rename TorBox setup menu item
v0.4.3 - Internal TorBox setup update
v0.4.2 - Public metadata cleanup
v0.4.1 - Internal setup flow cleanup
v0.4.0 - Internal setup updates
v0.3.0 - Internal setup updates
v0.2.0 - Added setup menu
v0.1.0 - Initial private helper add-on
